items.title: Build and task commands: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? If the application runs from the editor, the documented clean build and its artifact are guaranteed to work elsewhere.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Run the declared clean build with pinned dependencies, inspect exit status and artifact, and remove reliance on undeclared machine state.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Run the declared clean build with pinned dependencies, inspect exit status and artifact, and remove reliance on undeclared machine state.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.
